TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE.descript: Marker keyword. Playing a card with [gold]Tune Strain Response[/gold] has no effect by itself. When a Tune Strain rupture resolves, the total count of [gold]Tune Strain Response[/gold] cards in your draw pile, hand, and discard pile is tallied and overwrites the Tune Strain Response power stacks.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE.title: Tune Strain Response
